title: PullRepresentationConfig
description: PullRepresentationConfig: Configuration used to specify representation to be pulled and passed to RevitRepresentation fragment.

PullRenderMesh.description: If true, representation of elements will be pulled and stored under RenderMesh in RevitRepresentation fragment.

IncludeNonVisible.description: Invisible element parts will be pulled and passed to RevitRepresentation fragment if true. PullRepresentation switched to true needed for this to activate.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
